history.created_by: RUN |2 TARGETARCH=amd64 VERSION=2.4.4 /bin/sh -c apk add --no-cache         bash         ca-certificates         catatonit         curl         gettext         icecast         tzdata     && rm -rf /var/cache/apk/* /tmp/*     && mkdir -p /var/log/icecast     && chown -R nobody:nogroup /var/log/icecast # buildkit
